module-developer.description: Create, develop, fix, or verify modules in ./modules directory

sveltekit-guardian.description: Review code changes and validate module implementations

ui-ux-reviewer.description: Review UI/UX implementations for design consistency and accessibility

sync.template: Run bun run module:sync to sync all modules, then verify the symlinks are correct.

check.template: Run type checking and linting with bun run check and bun run lint. Fix any issues found.

migrate.template: Generate and run database migrations: bun run db:generate && bun run db:migrate
